evals.name: draft-skill
evals.prompt: Draft a new local skill for reviewing SQL migration safety and list the first benchmark prompts.

evals.name: framework-migration
evals.prompt: Do not add any intro before it. Migrate an old monolithic skill into thin router, playbooks, and decision guides without changing its role.

evals.name: benchmark-skill
evals.prompt: Design a task-focused benchmark for a local skill and specify route + content-marker expectations.

evals.name: improve-triggering
evals.prompt: Tighten a skill description that overtriggers against neighboring Spring and Java skills.

evals.name: artifact-retention
evals.prompt: Decide which benchmark files should stay in the repo after running OpenCode evals.
